subScenes.name: 连接测试
subScenes.description: 检查音视频是否正常，确认连接稳定

qaPairs.speakerText: Hey, can you hear me okay? The audio's a bit crackly.
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 嘿，你能听清吗？声音有点沙沙的。

responses.text: Yeah, I can hear you, but it's a little fuzzy. Try turning down your mic gain.
responses.text_cn: 能听见，但有点模糊，试试调低麦克风增益。

responses.text: I'm hearing you fine! Maybe your internet's lagging?
responses.text_cn: 我听得很清楚，是不是你网速卡了？

responses.text: Yeah, me too. Let me switch to mobile data.
responses.text_cn: 我也是，我切换成移动数据试试。

qaPairs.usageNote: 教用户描述网络问题并提出解决方案

qaPairs.speakerText: Your video's frozen—can you check your camera?
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 你的视频卡住了，能检查下摄像头吗？

responses.text: Oops, sorry! My camera's off—I'll turn it on now.
responses.text_cn: 哎呀抱歉，摄像头关了，我马上打开。

responses.text: It's on, but maybe my bandwidth's low. Let me close some tabs.
responses.text_cn: 开着呢，可能是带宽不够，我关几个标签页。

responses.text: Got it.
responses.text_cn: 好的。

qaPairs.usageNote: 引导用户主动排查视频问题并回应

subScenes.name: 寒暄问候
subScenes.description: 视频接通后自然寒暄，拉近关系

qaPairs.speakerText: Hey! Long time no see—how’ve you been?

responses.text: Not bad! Just swamped with work, but I’m hanging in there.
responses.text_cn: 还行，忙得要死，但还撑得住。

responses.text: Pretty good! I just got back from a trip to Japan.
responses.text_cn: 挺好的，刚从日本旅行回来。

responses.text: Same old.
responses.text_cn: 老样子。

qaPairs.usageNote: 鼓励用具体细节回应寒暄，避免只说‘fine’

qaPairs.speakerText: You look great! Did you get a haircut?
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 你看起来气色真好！是剪头发了吗��

responses.text: Thanks! Yeah, I finally went to that new barbershop downtown.
responses.text_cn: 谢谢！对，我去了 downtown 那家新开的理发店。

responses.text: Haha, nope—just good lighting and coffee!
responses.text_cn: 哈哈，没有，只是光线好+咖啡提神。

responses.text: Maybe. 😊
responses.text_cn: 也许吧。😊

qaPairs.usageNote: 教用户用轻松语气回应外貌赞美

subScenes.name: 进入正题
subScenes.description: 自然过渡到工作或计划讨论主题

qaPairs.speakerText: Anyway, I wanted to check in about the Q3 report—got time to go over it?
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 对了，想问问Q3报告的事，有空一起过一下吗？

responses.text: Sure! I’ve got 20 mins—let’s share my screen.
responses.text_cn: 当然！我有20分钟，我共享屏幕。

responses.text: Actually, I’m tied up till 3—can we push to tomorrow?
responses.text_cn: 我三点前有事，能推迟到明天吗？

responses.text: Go ahead.
responses.text_cn: 你先说。

qaPairs.usageNote: 教用户灵活协商时间并主动提出方案

qaPairs.speakerText: So, what’s your take on the new client deadline?
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 那你觉得新客户的截止日期咋办？

responses.text: I think we should ask for a week extension—this scope’s way too tight.
responses.text_cn: 我觉得该申请延一周，范围太紧了。

responses.text: We can make it if we split the tasks today.
responses.text_cn: 今天把任务分了就能赶在 deadline 前完成。

responses.text: Hmm.

qaPairs.usageNote: 引导用户表达观点并提供解决方案

subScenes.name: 结束通话
subScenes.description: 礼貌总结并自然道别，约定下次联系

qaPairs.speakerText: Alright, we covered everything—thanks for your help!
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 好，我们聊完了，谢谢你帮忙！

responses.text: No problem! Let’s catch up again next week—maybe coffee?
responses.text_cn: 不客气！下周再约，喝杯咖啡？

responses.text: Yep! I’ll send the notes by EOD.
responses.text_cn: 好的，我今天下班前发你总结。

responses.text: Bye!
responses.text_cn: 拜！

qaPairs.usageNote: 教用户用具体行动收尾，增强可信度

qaPairs.speakerText: I’m gonna sign off now—my cat’s knocking over my coffee!
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 我要下线了，我家猫把我的咖啡撞翻了！

responses.text: Haha, no worries! See you tomorrow!
responses.text_cn: 哈哈，没事！明天见！

responses.text: Oh no! Clean it quick—I’ll wait for your update.
responses.text_cn: 啊呀！快擦掉，我等你更新。

responses.text: Bye, cat lady!
responses.text_cn: 拜，猫姐！

qaPairs.usageNote: 鼓励用幽默或生活细节自然结束通话
